title: ctenopteris elastica
intro: Ctenopteris elastica, also known as the New Zealand fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial abilities, which have been used to treat various ailments such as arthritis, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ctenopteris elastica include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
